summary: Completed testing of Admin Edit User Profile feature. All backend API tests (10/10) and frontend UI tests passed. The feature allows admins to edit user's first_name, last_name, email, and phone from the admin panel.

frontend_ui.clicking_edit_profile_opens_modal: PASS - Modal titled 'Edit User Profile' opens
frontend_ui.save_changes_refreshes_details_view: PASS - Details view updated with new name
frontend_ui.duplicate_email_shows_error_toast: PASS - Toast shows 'Email is already in use by another account'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 165 tested the Admin Edit User Profile feature. The PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/{user_id}/profile endpoint is working correctly. The frontend Edit Profile modal in AdminUsersPage.js is fully functional with proper error handling for duplicate emails. Test user 'testuser@chiantin.eu' (id: test_user_001) was used for testing and data was restored to original values (Giovanni Rossi).
